name: We Are OFK
short_description: Start a virtual indie band in this behind-the-music comedy. Date, dance, skate, and run for your life across 5 episodes and interactive music videos, in a heartfelt story of what you risk to chase your dreams. All episodes out now!
detailed_description:
From the co-designer of Hyper Light Drifter,
We Are OFK is a behind-the-music comedy set in the creative heart of Los Angeles.

Start a band in this dreamy, musical journey from indiepop band OFK. Cry, skate, date, and run for your life in 5 interactive music videos, across a heartfelt story of what you risk to chase your dreams.

You play as Itsumi Saito, hustling pianist who just moved Downtown and broke up with her long-term girlfriend to lean into her dream of making it in music. But juggling practice, friends, a brutal commute to the west side, and a full-time job... Itsu is struggling to establish herself in the cutthroat music scene of LA. When she talks her way into a shmoozy Hollywood party and makes friends with a rising music producer, she sees a chance to bring her dreams a little closer.

We Are OFK is an interactive tv show of arguing over lyrics, sending sad texts, and playing Interactive Music Videos, including OFK’s debut single “Follow/Unfollow” and more!

Blending narrative, rhythm gameplay, comedy and drama, OFK explores what you risk to chase your dreams, and how it changes you.

Play as all 4 band members across 5 episodes, featuring:

  • 5 Interactive Music Videos: with debut tracks performed by OFK

  • Fully-voiced interactive dialogue from an all-star cast

  • Emotional texting, thirst texting, meme texting, emoji spamming

  • Original Los Angeles locations, and a one-of-a-kind boba spot

Featuring an all-star cast from across entertainment

  • songs written & produced by The Naked and Famous members Luna Shadows & Thomas Powers

  • Ally Maki (Toy Story 4, Dear White People)

  • Fiona Rene (CBS's Tracker, I Know What You Did Last Summer)

  • Syhaya Aviel (Vinyl, The Circle)

  • Erika Ishii (Ghost of Yotei, Apex Legends, Deathloop)

  • Teddy Dief (Hyper Light Drifter)

  • Deedee Magno Hall (Steven Universe)

  • Greg Chun (Squid Game, Demon Slayer, Super Smash Bros Ultimate)

  • Yuri Lowenthal (Marvel’s Spider-Man, Bugsnax)

  • Sara Amini (Ratchet & Clank: Rift Apart, The Twilight Zone)

  • Kimberly D Brooks (South Park, Psychonauts 2)

  • Kaiji Tang (Jujutsu Kaisen, Yakuza: Like a Dragon)

  • Miguel Caballero (Killer 7)

  • Krizia Bajos (Far Cry 6, Gotham Knights)
